title: Verify 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access' on Pause pop-up
description: Test that clicking the secondary action on the Pause pop-up successfully pauses the user's trial.
preconditions: The 'Loss Aversion' pop-up for pausing is displayed

steps.description: 1. In the pop-up, click the 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access' button

expected_result: The user's trial is paused. The user is returned to the Trial Corner, which now shows a 'Paused' state with locked content sections.
